<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# src/installer

Interactive TTY wizard and non-interactive CLI for installing agents-reverse-engineer command templates, hooks, and runtime integrations (Claude, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode) into global/local config directories, managing `.gitignore`/`.vscode/settings.json` entries, and uninstalling all artifacts with surgical precision.

## Contents

- **[index.ts](./index.ts)**: Entry point; exports `runInstaller()` orchestrating workflow with `SplitPaneLayout` (44-char left pane for banner/spinner, right pane for prompts/progress), `parseInstallerArgs()` parsing CLI flags, delegates to `runInstall()`/`runUninstall()` based on `--uninstall`, manages `Spinner` lifecycle, prompts for runtime/location in interactive mode via `selectRuntime()`/`selectLocation()`, merges `are init` into install via `writeDefaultConfig()` if config missing, calls `ensureGitignoreEntry()`/`ensureVscodeExclude()` for local installs, `showNextSteps()` on success.
- **[operations.ts](./operations.ts)**: `installFiles()` installs templates/hooks/plugins for all runtimes or single runtime via `installFilesForRuntime()`, calls `registerHooks()`/`registerPermissions()` for Claude/Gemini using `jsonc-parser` to merge into `settings.json`, writes `are.rules` prefix approvals and `AGENTS.override.md` context-loading instructions for Codex (protects user files via `shouldWriteManagedFile()`), seeds `.npmrc` with project-local npm cache via `ensureNpmrcSection()` for Codex local installs, copies plugins to `.opencode/plugins/`, `verifyInstallation()` checks file existence, `formatInstallResult()` renders summary, `writeVersionFile()` writes `ARE-VERSION` from `getPackageVersion()`.
- **[uninstall.ts](./uninstall.ts)**: `uninstallFiles()` removes templates/hooks/permissions/rules/plugins/agents/VERSION via `uninstallFilesForRuntime()`, `unregisterHooks()`/`unregisterPermissions()` use `jsonc-parser` to strip ARE entries from `settings.json`, `deleteConfigFolder()` removes `.agents-reverse-engineer/`, `removeNpmrcSection()` extracts ARE-managed cache config from `.npmrc`, `cleanupAreSkillDirs()` removes empty `are-*` subdirectories, `cleanupEmptyDirs()` recursively prunes stopping at runtime roots, `cleanupLegacyGeminiFiles()` removes old `are-*.md` and nested `are/` structure, `cleanupOpenCodeInfrastructure()` removes `package.json`/`bun.lock`/`.gitignore`/`node_modules/` if no commands/plugins/agents remain, removes Codex `AGENTS.override.md` only if marker present.
- **[paths.ts](./paths.ts)**: `getAllRuntimes()` returns `['claude', 'codex', 'opencode', 'gemini']`, `getRuntimePaths()` resolves `{global, local, settingsFile}` with env override support (`CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR`, `OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR` > `XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode`, `GEMINI_CONFIG_DIR`), `resolveInstallPath()` joins `projectRoot` with `paths.local` for local mode or uses `paths.global` for global, `resolveCodexConfigPath()` resolves `.codex` (distinct from `.agents`), `getSettingsPath()` returns `settings.json` absolute path, `isRuntimeInstalledLocally()`/`isRuntimeInstalledGlobally()`/`getInstalledRuntimes()` check directory existence via `stat()`.
- **[prompts.ts](./prompts.ts)**: `isInteractive()` checks `process.stdin.isTTY`, `selectOption()` dispatches to `arrowKeySelect()` (raw mode, up/down/return, ANSI cursor movement `\x1b[${n}A`, line clear `\x1b[2K`, cyan highlight) or `numberedSelect()` (readline input, validates range `1-${options.length}`), `selectRuntime()`, `selectLocation()`, `confirmAction()` provide domain-specific prompts, `cleanupRawMode()` restores stdin on exit/SIGINT, registers global handlers `process.on('exit')` and `process.on('SIGINT')`.
- **[banner.ts](./banner.ts)**: `VERSION` from `getVersion()`, `BANNER_LINES` (6-line ASCII logo), `gold()` wraps text in ANSI 256-color #220, `compositeBanner()` merges `GOLDEN_CIRCLE_FRAMES[frameIndex]` with static logo padded to `FRAME_WIDTH`, `getLeftPaneContent()` returns padded banner/version/tagline, `displayBanner()` renders to layout or console, `showHelp()` prints CLI usage (options: `--runtime`, `-g/-l`, `-u`, `--force`, `-q`, `-h`), `showSuccess()`/`showError()`/`showWarning()`/`showInfo()` emit colored prefixes (green ✓, red ✗, yellow !, cyan >), `showNextSteps()` displays six-command ARE workflow (`{prefix}help`, `{prefix}discover`, `{prefix}generate`, `{prefix}update`, `{prefix}specify`, `{prefix}clean` where prefix is `/are-` for Claude/Gemini/OpenCode or `$are-` for Codex).
- **[layout.ts](./layout.ts)**: `SplitPaneLayout` class with `setLeftPane()`, `renderLeftPane()`, `drawSeparator()` using `│`, `appendRight()` with wrapping via `wrapText()` (preserves ANSI codes by tracking visible character count), `setRightRow()`, `clearRightFrom()`, `refreshRight()`, `finalize()` shows cursor via `\x1b[?25h`, `clearScreen()` emits `\x1b[2J\x1b[H`, viewport scrolling via `viewportTop` and `viewportHeight` synced to left pane height, `renderRightViewport()` displays last `viewportHeight` lines from `rightBuffer`, `moveTo(row, col)` emits `\x1b[${row};${col}H`, `clearLineFromCursor()` emits `\x1b[0K`, `stripAnsi(s)` removes codes via `/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m/g`.
- **[spinner.ts](./spinner.ts)**: `GOLDEN_CIRCLE_SPINNER` config with 36 frames at 80ms interval, `Spinner` class with `start(row, col)` hiding cursor via `\x1b[?25l` and starting `setInterval`, `stop()` clearing frame region via `\x1b[0K` and showing cursor via `\x1b[?25h`, `render()` positioning cursor via `\x1b[row;colH` and writing frame lines split by `\n`.
- **[project-files.ts](./project-files.ts)**: `ensureGitignoreEntry()` adds `# agents-reverse-engineer` section with `*.sum` and `.npm-cache` patterns to `.gitignore`, `removeGitignoreEntry()` strips section and patterns, `ensureVscodeExclude()` sets `files.exclude["**/*.sum"]=true` in `.vscode/settings.json` via `jsonc-parser` (`parse`, `modify`, `applyEdits`, formatting: `{tabSize: 1, insertSpaces: false}`), `removeVscodeExclude()` deletes key and parent object if empty, returns false on malformed JSON to prevent data loss.
- **[types.ts](./types.ts)**: `Runtime = 'claude' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'gemini' | 'all'`, `Location = 'global' | 'local'`, `InstallerArgs` interface with `runtime?`, `global`, `local`, `uninstall`, `force`, `help`, `quiet`, `InstallerResult` with `success`, `runtime`, `location`, `filesCreated`, `filesSkipped`, `errors`, `hookRegistered?`, `versionWritten?`, `RuntimePaths` with `global`, `local`, `settingsFile`.

## File Relationships

- **index.ts** orchestrates: calls `parseInstallerArgs()` → `createLayout()` → `Spinner.start()` → `selectRuntime()`/`selectLocation()` → `runInstall()`/`runUninstall()` → `Spinner.stop()` → `displayInstallResults()`/`displayUninstallResults()`; runInstall calls `installFiles()` → `writeDefaultConfig()` (if config missing) → `ensureGitignoreEntry()`/`ensureVscodeExclude()` (local only) → `verifyInstallation()` → `displayInstallResults()` → `showNextSteps()`.
- **operations.ts** delegates: `installFiles()` calls `installFilesForRuntime()` → `getTemplatesForRuntime()` → `registerHooks()`/`registerPermissions()`/writes Codex rules via `buildCodexRulesFileContent()`/`buildLocalContextRulesContent()`/`ensureNpmrcSection()` → `writeVersionFile()` → `verifyInstallation()`.
- **uninstall.ts** mirrors operations.ts: `uninstallFiles()` calls `uninstallFilesForRuntime()` → `unregisterHooks()`/`unregisterPermissions()` → `removeNpmrcSection()` → `cleanupAreSkillDirs()`/`cleanupEmptyDirs()`/`cleanupLegacyGeminiFiles()`/`cleanupOpenCodeInfrastructure()`.
- **prompts.ts** integrates with layout.ts: `selectOption()` calls `arrowKeySelect()` which updates `layout.appendRight()` and advances `currentRightRow` on selection, renders at fixed `promptStartRow` in right pane.
- **banner.ts** uses frames/index.ts: `compositeBanner()` accesses `GOLDEN_CIRCLE_FRAMES` and `FRAME_WIDTH` to merge animation with static logo.
- **paths.ts** consumed by: operations.ts (`resolveInstallPath()`, `getSettingsPath()`, `resolveCodexConfigPath()`), uninstall.ts (`resolveInstallPath()`, `resolveCodexConfigPath()`), index.ts (via `getAllRuntimes()` for 'all' runtime expansion).

## Behavioral Contracts

### CLI Arguments (from parseInstallerArgs)
- `-g/--global`: global installation
- `-l/--local`: local installation
- `--runtime <value>`: one of `claude`, `codex`, `opencode`, `gemini`, `all`
- `-u/--uninstall`: uninstall mode
- `--force`: overwrite existing files
- `-q/--quiet`: suppress banner/spinner
- `-h/--help`: display usage

### Hook Registration Patterns (from operations.ts)

**Claude hooks**:
- Command format: `node .claude/hooks/{filename}`
- SessionStart: `[{ type: 'command', command: 'node .claude/hooks/are-check-update.js' }]`
- PostToolUse (matcher: `Read`): `[{ type: 'command', command: 'node .claude/hooks/are-context-loader.js' }]`

**Gemini hooks**:
- Command format: `node .gemini/hooks/{filename}`
- SessionStart only: `[{ name: 'are-check-update', type: 'command', command: 'node .gemini/hooks/are-check-update.js' }]`

**Claude permissions** (from operations.ts `ARE_PERMISSIONS`):
```
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer init*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer discover*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer generate*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer update*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer specify*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer rebuild*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer clean*)
Bash(npx agents-reverse-engineer dashboard*)
Bash(sleep *)
```

**Codex rules** (from operations.ts `CODEX_PREFIX_RULES`):
```toml
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "init"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "discover"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "generate"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "update"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "specify"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "rebuild"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "clean"]
prefix_rule = ["npx", "agents-reverse-engineer", "dashboard"]
prefix_rule = ["sleep"]
```

**Codex context-loading instructions** (from operations.ts `buildLocalContextRulesContent()`):
> After reading a project file, load `AGENTS.override.md` and `AGENTS.md` in the file's directory (if present). Then load `AGENTS.override.md` and `AGENTS.md` from each parent directory up to repo root (if present). Skip reloading unchanged instruction files already loaded in the current task. If instructions conflict, nearest-directory instructions override parent/root instructions.

**Codex .npmrc section** (from operations.ts `NPMRC_SECTION_LINES`):
```
# BEGIN agents-reverse-engineer
# Project-local npm cache to avoid global ~/.npm permission issues (EACCES)
# and keep ARE command execution reproducible across environments.
cache=.agents-reverse-engineer/.npm-cache
# END agents-reverse-engineer
```

### Gitignore Section (from project-files.ts `GITIGNORE_PATTERNS`)
```
# agents-reverse-engineer
*.sum
.npm-cache
```

### VS Code Exclude Pattern (from project-files.ts)
```json
{
  "files.exclude": {
    "**/*.sum": true
  }
}
```

### ANSI Escape Sequences (from layout.ts, spinner.ts)
- Cursor positioning: `\x1b[${row};${col}H`
- Clear line from cursor: `\x1b[0K`
- Clear screen: `\x1b[2J\x1b[H`
- Hide cursor: `\x1b[?25l`
- Show cursor: `\x1b[?25h`
- ANSI code stripping regex: `/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m/g`

### Installation File Markers (from operations.ts, project-files.ts, uninstall.ts)
- Codex local context rules marker: `<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer installer: local-context-rules -->`
- Config folder: `.agents-reverse-engineer` (matches config/loader.ts)
- VERSION file: `ARE-VERSION` (contains `package.json` version)
- .npmrc section delimiters: `# BEGIN agents-reverse-engineer`, `# END agents-reverse-engineer`

### Uninstall Cleanup Constants (from uninstall.ts)
- Hook filenames: `are-context-loader.js`, `are-check-update.js`, `are-session-end.js`
- Plugin filenames: `are-check-update.js` (OpenCode plugins/)
- Agent filename: `are-summarizer.md` (OpenCode agents/, must match ai/backends/opencode.ts `OPENCODE_AGENT_NAME`)
- Codex rules filename: `are.rules`
- Local context rules filename: `AGENTS.override.md`
- Runtime root directories: `.claude`, `.agents`, `.codex`, `.opencode`, `.gemini`, `.config` (cleanup stops here)

## Workflow & Conventions

### Installation Sequence (from index.ts)
1. Parse CLI args via `parseInstallerArgs()`
2. If `-h/--help`: call `showHelp()`, exit
3. Create `SplitPaneLayout` if TTY and not quiet (leftWidth=44, padding=2)
4. Display banner via `displayBanner()` or log golden ASCII to console
5. Start golden circle spinner via `Spinner.start()` (36 frames, 80ms interval)
6. If interactive and missing args: prompt for runtime/location via `selectRuntime()`/`selectLocation()`
7. Call `runInstall()` or `runUninstall()` with onProgress callback updating right pane
8. Stop spinner via `Spinner.stop()`, restore static banner frame
9. Display results via `displayInstallResults()`/`displayUninstallResults()`
10. If install success: call `showNextSteps()` with ARE command workflow

### Non-Interactive Mode (from index.ts)
- Requires `--runtime` and `-g/-l` flags; exits with error if missing
- No prompts, layout, or spinner

### Interactive Mode (from index.ts, prompts.ts)
- Detects TTY via `process.stdin.isTTY`
- `arrowKeySelect()`: raw mode, ANSI cursor movement, highlights selected option with cyan
- `numberedSelect()`: readline input, validates range `1-${options.length}`
- Raw mode cleanup: `cleanupRawMode()` on exit/SIGINT, restores stdin visibility

### Hook/Permission Registration (from operations.ts)
- Uses `jsonc-parser` (`parse`, `modify`, `applyEdits`) to preserve JSONC comments
- Formatting options: `{ tabSize: 2, insertSpaces: true }`
- Claude: adds hooks to nested `HookEvent[]` arrays with optional `matcher` for PostToolUse, adds permissions to `settings.permissions.allow[]`
- Gemini: adds hooks to flat `GeminiHook[]` arrays, SessionStart only (no PostToolUse support)
- Codex: writes TOML prefix rules to `.codex/rules/are.rules` via `buildCodexRulesFileContent()`, writes context-loading instructions to `AGENTS.override.md` only if marker present or file absent (`shouldWriteManagedFile()`), seeds `.npmrc` with project-local cache via `ensureNpmrcSection()` (idempotent: skips if `NPMRC_BEGIN_MARKER` already present)

### Uninstall Safety (from uninstall.ts, project-files.ts)
- `removeVscodeExclude()` returns false on malformed JSON to prevent data loss
- `shouldWriteManagedFile()` protects user-authored files by checking marker presence before overwrite with `--force`
- `cleanupEmptyDirs()` stops at runtime root directories (`.claude`, `.agents`, `.codex`, `.opencode`, `.gemini`, `.config`)
- Ignores errors in cleanup helpers (`cleanupEmptyDirs`, `cleanupLegacyGeminiFiles`, `cleanupOpenCodeInfrastructure`) to avoid blocking uninstall on permission issues
- `removeNpmrcSection()`: removes ARE-managed cache config via marker-delimited extraction, deletes `.npmrc` if empty after removal, returns 'removed', 'deleted', or 'not-found'

### Path Resolution (from paths.ts)
- Global paths use `os.homedir()`, local paths use relative names (`.claude`, `.agents`, `.opencode`, `.gemini`)
- Environment variable overrides (priority order): `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR`, `OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR` > `XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode`, `GEMINI_CONFIG_DIR`
- Codex CLI config uses `.codex` (distinct from `.agents` skill paths)
- Settings files always `{global}/settings.json`

### Animation Implementation (from spinner.ts, frames/index.ts)
- 36 pre-rendered frames (6 lines × 16 chars) depicting rotating golden ring
- Character gradient: `.` → `·` → `:` → `;` → `o` → `O` for depth/glow effect
- 10° rotation per frame, 80ms interval (2.88s full rotation)
- Spinner updates fixed screen coordinates without scrolling
- Hides cursor during animation, shows on stop

### Layout Rendering (from layout.ts)
- Left pane: 44 chars (banner + golden circle)
- Separator: vertical `│` at `separatorCol = leftWidth + padding`
- Right pane: `rightPaneWidth = terminalWidth - separatorCol - padding`
- Viewport scrolling: displays last `viewportHeight` lines from `rightBuffer`
- Line wrapping: `wrapText()` preserves ANSI codes by tracking visible character count separately

## Subdirectories

- **[frames/](./frames/)**: 36 ASCII art frames (6 lines × 16 chars) for rotating golden ring spinner; exports `GOLDEN_CIRCLE_FRAMES`, `FRAME_WIDTH`, `FRAME_HEIGHT` via index.ts; consumed by spinner.ts and banner.ts for animation compositing.
